purpose: Refusal-code registry slice for the Passy-Franklin asset gate. The same codes are emitted by three layers in lockstep: scripts/check_franklin_avatar_assets.zsh (build time, refuses xcodebuild/swift build), Plugins/CheckFranklinAvatarAssets/ (SwiftPM build-tool plugin), and Sources/FranklinApp/FranklinLaunchGate.swift (runtime, refuses to render the avatar). The single source of truth for the asset list is cells/franklin/avatar/required_assets.json.

codes.summary: A required Passy asset listed in required_assets.json is absent from the workspace.
codes.user_visible_text: Required Passy assets are not present. Build refused.

codes.summary: Asset is present but below the min_bytes floor declared in required_assets.json.
Asset is present and sized but its sha256 does not match the pin in required_assets.json (only checked when sha256 is non-null).
Voice profile is parseable but personaID does not equal the required value (default: franklin.guide.v1).
Could not locate gaiaFTCL/ root from the launch directory or build context.
